title: Sales Rules of Engagement
summary: Governance, boundaries, and expectations for enterprise sales at GPC. Pair with your physical tour and manager coaching.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.body: Use this module to align on how we engage prospects and partners: roles, escalation, and approved motions before you run opportunities in Salesforce.

sections.heading: Source materials
sections.body: Primary document on disk from the training library:

resources.label: Sales Rules of Engagement (ROE)
resources.path: /Users/ba/Documents/GPC Training Material/Sales Rules of Engagement (ROE) - Revised August 2025 (1).pdf

guidde.notes: Reserve a Guidde walkthrough: e.g. how to apply ROE during discovery and when to loop in leadership.
